titleStmt.title: SII 15.121: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 121. (B.K. No. 119 and 119-A of 1926-27.) KAṆVI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the wall, left of entrance, of the temple of Īśvara.
This is dated the 7th regnal year of the king, Vijaya, Kārttika-puṇṇami, Monday, corresponding to 1173 A.D., October 22.

It records the gift of Pannāya for offerings to the god Mūlasthāna, by the Aṟuvattokkalu, the Gauṇḍi of Kaṇiyahaḷḷi, the Three Hundred of Ugura, the Thousand, Chauḍamanāyaka and others after washing the feet of Amṛitarāśi, the āchārya of the temple.

In continuation of the above from line 16 is engraved another epigraph which refers to the 7th regnal year of Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara, Bhujabalabhīma Vīra-Bijjaṇa and cites the identical details of the above date. It thus corresponds to 1173 A.D., October 22. This Vīra-Bijjaṇa must evidently be his namesake Sinda chief, son of Chāvuṇḍa. It registers the gift of Bīravaṇa of the god's garden for offerings to the god Mūlasthāna into the hands of the above āchārya by Kēśava and Baladēvanāyaka at the instance of Mādhava-daṇḍanāyaka. Another gift for a perpetual lamp to the deity was made by Dāsimarasa, the Mahāprabhu of Soraṭūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: This is engraved in continuation of No. 156 of South Indian Inscriptions, Vol. XI, Pt. I.
div.p:
svasti śrī
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhave koḍadinudiysidagastyaṁ kaḍalaṁ
pīrvvanta maṁḍaḻēsvararājyakkoḍeyanene puṭṭi bijjalaneḍegoṁḍaṁ sārvvabhauma padavīśrīya . Ogedorvvaṁ neṟeviṭṭu śātrava tama
stōmaṁ samaṁnteydu meydaḷevaṁnaṁ suvidhēya bhūpa ya nartisalu bagevannaṁ kumudarkkalakke vogevannaṁ tī
dattāvagaṁ jagamaṁ rāyamarāri sōmanripanudyatkīrtticaṁdrātapaṁ . Ā rāya murāri padāṁbhōruha sēvātilō
bhriṁgaṁ sāraguṇagaṇanidhānanaphārayaśaṁ dhanya daṁḍanātha negaḷdaṁ . Āvaneṇe daṁḍanātha dēvaṁge samagra samara
saṁmarddada daśagrīvaṁge bageye mallugidēvaṁge payōdhiparivritōrvvītaḷadoḷu © tadācāryya prabhāvameṁteṁdaḍe
cārucaritradoḻu manamanā śēṣa ti bhāvaneyoḻu tāḷdi mahē svarādriyāgesavā garapā
labdha prasastavibhavaṁ bhūbhāgadoḷu puṇyarbāhmaṇaraṁ yatimukhyanaṁ [A]mritarāsikhyātiyōgīsvara . tapavri
mururuṁdaṁ guvamādivirājita kaṇṭhābharaṇaṁ manōjamadamattēbhēṁdra siṁhaṁ siva ṣṭāpataṁgaṁ raṇanuddhata
vivarjjitanādaṁ yatimukhyanintamritarāsi khyātiyōgīsvaraṁ . yiṟe ṟiya caṁdrakāntada tiḷigoḻada yiṁ pala
ḷayōnijadamaḷayajadataṇpaṁ taḷedirkuṁ Amritamunipanamaḷaguṇaṁgaḷu . svasti śrīmatu kaḷacuryya bhujabaḻa ca
kravartti rāyamurāri sōvidēva varṣada 7 neya vijayasaṁvatsarada kārttikasuddha puṁṇnami sōmavāra vyatiyapāta saṁkrāṁtti kūḍida puThe letter va is engraved above the line in smaller siśe.
ṇyatithiyoḷu śrīmatu kaṇiyahaḷḷi gauṁḍi mukhyavāgi Aṟuvattokkalumuguramūnū rvvaruṁ sāsirvvaruṁ mukhyavāgi paṁnāya
ḍilūra cauUḍamanāyaka mūlastāna dēvarācāryya yamritarāśi dēvara pādaprakṣāḷanaṁ māḍi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi dēvargge
biṭṭa paṁnāyamaṁ sarvvanamasyavāgi dēvara nivēdyakke biṭṭaru . svasti samasta praśastisahitaṁ śrī mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ sāhasō
ttuṁga bhujabalabhīma vīrabijjaṇa dēvavarṣada 7 neya vijayasaṁvatsarada kārttika puṁṇnami sōma
vāra vyatiyapāta saṁkrānti saṁyōgada puṁṇyatithiyoḷu śrīmatu mādhave daṁḍanāyakana besadiṁ kēsavadēvaṁ hoThesa is engraved above the line in smaller siśe.
ḷala baladēvanāyakaru kaṇiya mūlastānadēvarācāryya Amritarāsidēvara pāda prakṣā
ḷanaṁ māḍi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi dēvara tōṭada hēṟina bīravaṇamaṁ nivēdyakkesarvva namasyavāgi biṭṭaru .
svasti śrīmatu sūraṭūra mahāprabhudāsimarasaṁ kaṇiya mūlastānadēvarācāryyaṁ Amri
tarāsidēvara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi hēṟina hāgada bīravaṇava dēvara naṁdā dīvigege sarvvanamasyavāgi
biṭṭaru . haḷḷi gauḍi mukyavāgi yaṟuvattokkaluṁ Uguramūnūrvvaru sāsirvvaru mukhyavāgi
pratipāḷisuvaru . pratipāḷisadiddavaru narakaṁbokka paṁcamahāpātakaru .
Digital edition of SII 15.121 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
